'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 137''' was the one hundred thirty-seventh issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[August 11]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Andrew Darling]], [[Matthew Harvey]], [[Iain Lowson]], [[James McFadden]] and [[Michael Schiavetta]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*[[Death Star II/Legends|Second Death Star]] - Outer Shell

*[[Hologram/Legends|Holographic Technology]]
*''[[Stinger]]''
